name: aspens
description: Keep coding-agent context accurate as your codebase changes

scripts.postinstall:
echo '
  📌 aspens v0.7.1: Scanner now recognizes C#, Java, Kotlin, Swift, PHP, Elixir, and F# source files for domain discovery.
     If a prior `doc init` came up empty for one of these languages, re-run it after upgrading.

  🌲 aspens is in active development — please keep it up to date.
     Run into issues? Let us know: https://github.com/aspenkit/aspens/issues
'
